assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states under Regular Channel section: 'Control plane: Auto-upgraded to 1.31 (next supported minor version)' and 'No escape: Cannot avoid this upgrade once 1.30 hits EoS on Feb 28, 2025'

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response clearly states Extended channel provides 24 months support and shows timeline with Extended Support End as February 28, 2027, giving 2 additional years compared to Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response states for No Channel clusters: 'Control plane: Force-upgraded to 1.31 immediately at EoS' and 'Node pools: Force-upgraded even with auto-upgrade disabled - this is systematic enforcement'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Only 30-day "no upgrades" exclusion can delay (but accumulates security debt)' and provides specific command example for no_upgrades exclusion with 30-day limitation

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Plan manual upgrades ahead of EoS enforcement' section and states 'Best practice: Upgrade manually in January 2025, before the February EoS deadline' with specific upgrade commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Set up EoS monitoring' section with Cloud Logging query example and mentions 'scheduled upgrade notifications (72h advance warning)'

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific gcloud command for checking deprecation insights: 'gcloud recommender insights list --insight-type=google.container.DiagnosisInsight' under validation section

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly warn against 'snowflaking' or discuss security/reliability risks of manually freezing versions. While it mentions 'accumulates security debt' briefly, it doesn't adequately address the broader risks of version freezing practices
